product: Disable DBFS root and mounts is in Public Preview
tagline: You can now disable access to the Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root and mounts in existing Databricks workspaces.
what_it_does: You can now disable access to the Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root and mounts in existing Databricks workspaces. This page describes how to disable access to the legacy Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root and mounts in existing Databricks workspaces. To disable DBFS root and mounts at the account level for new workspaces, use the Disable legacy features account setting.
why_it_matters: Disabling DBFS root and mounts enhances your security posture by removing access to shared storage that is not governed by Unity Catalog.
plain_summary: You can now disable access to the Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root and mounts in existing Databricks workspaces. This page describes how to disable access to the legacy Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root and mounts in existing Databricks workspaces.
key_takeaway: You can now disable access to the Databricks Filesystem (DBFS) root and mounts in existing Databricks workspaces.
